text.title: AI-Feature Trust Metrics for Market Research Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end with explicit decision-gates.

step.name: define-dimensions
step.action: Pick signal + survey item per of the four dimensions.

step.name: wire-signals
step.action: Emit events; verify in dev environment.

step.name: baseline-capture
step.action: Run survey + 1-week signal capture at < 5% rollout.
step.decision-gate: Do not exceed 5% rollout until baseline captured.

step.name: rollout-with-fairness-cuts
step.action: Roll out with dashboard showing fairness split by ≥2 segments.

step.name: review-cadence
step.action: Weekly trust review; investigate any dimension drop > 10% vs baseline.
